parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
actor "任务开始 nsq 消息" as Actor
participant GuideTaskStartListener
participant GuideTaskStartProcessor
participant GuideTaskStartDomainService
participant GuideTaskStartStrategy
participant ShoppingGuideReadApi
participant GuideTaskRepository
participant GuideTaskDataRepository

Actor -> GuideTaskStartListener : 1 监听任务开始消息
activate GuideTaskStartListener

GuideTaskStartListener -> GuideTaskStartProcessor : 2 开始处理
activate GuideTaskStartProcessor

GuideTaskStartProcessor -> GuideTaskRepository : 3 查询任务
activate GuideTaskRepository
deactivate GuideTaskRepository

GuideTaskStartProcessor -> GuideTaskStartDomainService : 4 开始任务
activate GuideTaskStartDomainService

GuideTaskStartDomainService -> GuideTaskStartStrategy : 5 构建任务
activate GuideTaskStartStrategy

GuideTaskStartStrategy -> ShoppingGuideReadApi : 6 根据部门查询导购
activate ShoppingGuideReadApi
deactivate ShoppingGuideReadApi

GuideTaskStartStrategy -> GuideTaskStartStrategy : 7 根据导购进行任务分配
activate GuideTaskStartStrategy
deactivate GuideTaskStartStrategy

group Transaction
    GuideTaskStartDomainService -> GuideTaskDataRepository : 8 保存分配给导购的任务
    activate GuideTaskDataRepository
    deactivate GuideTaskDataRepository

    GuideTaskStartDomainService -> GuideTaskRepository : 9 status flow 任务状态流转至 已启动
    activate GuideTaskRepository
    deactivate GuideTaskRepository

    GuideTaskStartDomainService -> GuideTaskDataRepository : 10 任务流转为执行中
    activate GuideTaskDataRepository
    deactivate GuideTaskDataRepository
end

deactivate GuideTaskStartStrategy
deactivate GuideTaskStartDomainService
deactivate GuideTaskStartProcessor
deactivate GuideTaskStartListener

@enduml
```
